comments.body:
AMNMToken will hold below information
* ApplicationId
* NodeHostAddr
* ApplicationSubmitter
* MasterKeyId
As this token is not going to expire so not adding expiration time.

As a part of this patch only enabling following features.
* During start RM generates NMTokenMasterKey
* For Every NodeManager registration master key is shared along with containerTokenMasterKey
* If there is a rollover then in the hearbeat master key will be shared.

RM at present doesn't send NMToken at container allocation (will be there in YARN-693).
AM at present doesn't store NMToken ...(will be there in YARN-693)
AM at present doesn't send these tokens to NM for all AM-NM communication (will be there in YARN-694).
NM at present doesn't verify the NMToken (will be there in YARN-694).

Added test cases to verify RMNMSecretKeys - at rm start and at roll over.

Looked at the patch. Few comments:

NMTokenIdentifier
 - NodeId instead of nodeHostAddr?
 - It should be per ApplicationAttemptID as it is given to AMs.
 - Why setters? Don't think we need them. If so, mark the class fields as final.
 - getUser() -> ApplicationAttemptID?

The changes to common SecretManager can be avoided if you pass in the generatedKey also as an argument to MasterKeyData constructor.

BuilderUtils
 - newNMToken can avoid passing NodeID once we move NMTokenIdentifier to use NodeID.

RMNMTokenSecretManager: Unused field. Can be added later if it is needed in the followup patches.

NMNMTokenSecretManager.appStarted is not needed?

RMNMTokenSecretManager -> NMTokenSecretManagerInRM and NMNMTokenSecretManager -> NMTokenSecretManagerInNM?

NMToken now will have below information
* ApplicationAttemptId
* NodeId
* ApplicationSubmitter
* MasterKeyId

Fixed..

Fixed..

bq. RMNMTokenSecretManager: Unused field. Can be added later if it is needed in the followup patches.

Ok will add it in YARN-693

agree.. fixed.

:)

comments.body:
AMNMToken will hold below information
* ApplicationId
* NodeHostAddr
* ApplicationSubmitter
* MasterKeyId
As this token is not going to expire so not adding expiration time.

As a part of this patch only enabling following features.
* During start RM generates NMTokenMasterKey
* For Every NodeManager registration master key is shared along with containerTokenMasterKey
* If there is a rollover then in the hearbeat master key will be shared.

RM at present doesn't send NMToken at container allocation (will be there in YARN-693).
AM at present doesn't store NMToken ...(will be there in YARN-693)
AM at present doesn't send these tokens to NM for all AM-NM communication (will be there in YARN-694).
NM at present doesn't verify the NMToken (will be there in YARN-694).

Added test cases to verify RMNMSecretKeys - at rm start and at roll over.
